title: Situation: Communication Goal

story.scene: A concrete situation shared with Carlos

emotionalArc.emotion: A memorable feeling appropriate to the story
emotionalArc.startsWith: How the learner feels when the scene begins
emotionalArc.endsWith: How successful communication should make the learner feel
emotionalArc.earnedBy: The specific communication success that creates the change

microCliffhanger.speaker: Carlos
microCliffhanger.spanish: A short natural line that points toward the next story event.

learnerChoices.objective: The shared communication objective for every option
learnerChoices.prompt: Carlos asks the learner to make one meaningful choice.

options.carlosSpanish: A response that specifically acknowledges this choice

learnerChoices.rejoin: The canonical story beat shared by every branch

message.spanish: One brief acknowledgment of an earlier learner choice.

eveningRecap.message: A short message from Carlos that acknowledges what happened after the lesson.

carlosIntroduction.text: Carlos introduces the situation, the reason it matters, and the three things the learner will be able to do.

canDo: Understand and respond to one common question.
recycledLanguage: A phrase from the previous lesson
objectives: Understand and respond to one common question.

vocabulary.tip: Use at any time of day.

grammar.meaning: What the pattern lets the learner communicate.
grammar.explanation: A short explanation without unnecessary terminology.
grammar.practicePrompt: Say one true sentence with the pattern.

listening.instructions: Listen once, then choose what Carlos means.

speaking.instructions: Listen, repeat, then say the phrase without reading.

items.focus: Keep the vowels short and clear.

speakingChallenge.prompt: Respond to Carlos using the target phrase.

miniConversation.setting: The real situation for this lesson
miniConversation.goal: Complete a short exchange with Carlos.

pronunciation.focus: One sound, stress pattern, or conversational rhythm.

culture.title: One useful cultural note
culture.text: One short paragraph that helps the learner use this lesson naturally.

livingWorldInteractions.title: A small detail in the scene
livingWorldInteractions.prompt: An optional invitation to look closer.
livingWorldInteractions.carlosSpanish: A short, natural observation from Carlos.

realLifeMission.title: Carlos Challenge
realLifeMission.mission: Complete one realistic interaction using this lesson’s language.

canDo: I can complete the lesson’s main situation.
I can understand and answer its most common question.
